errors.avatar_audio_required: Local Avatar video needs audio for lipsync. Use Windows local or Piper local.
errors.avatar_comfyui_not_ready: Could not connect to ComfyUI for Local Avatar video at {url}. Open ComfyUI or fix the configured URL/worker and try again.
errors.avatar_image_missing: Local Avatar video needs an avatar source image.
errors.avatar_nodes_missing: ComfyUI is open, but the required avatar stack was not loaded. Missing nodes: {nodes}.
errors.enter_topic: Enter a topic or idea before generating.
errors.generate_or_load_project: Generate or load a project before creating the final video.
errors.image_workflow_only_auto: Automatic setup only found a static image workflow. For 'Local AI video', choose a ComfyUI workflow that outputs real clips or gifs.
errors.image_workflow_only_selected: The available workflow only generates static images. For 'Local AI video', use a ComfyUI workflow that outputs real clips or gifs.
errors.no_models_available: No model was selected and LM Studio returned no available models.
errors.task_running: A task is already running. Please wait.
errors.workflow_image_only: The selected workflow only generates static images. For 'Local AI video', use a ComfyUI workflow that outputs real videos or gifs.
errors.workflow_required: For 'Local AI video', select a ComfyUI JSON workflow that outputs real video or gif per scene.

header.subtitle: Use Quick setup for one-click video creation, or keep the separate script and render steps when you need more control.
header.title: Video workshop

hero.description: Turn an idea into script, prompts, local AI visuals, storyboard fallback, and MP4 output without blocking the UI.
hero.subtitle: {version}  |  LM Studio + local AI video desktop

local_ai.tip: Tip: use 'Windows local' for voice without installing Piper. The app's automatic workflow works for cinematic AI images inside 'Storyboard local'. For 'Local AI video' choose a ComfyUI workflow that outputs clips or gifs. For 'Local Avatar video' use a lipsync/avatar workflow plus a base avatar image. 'GPU for ComfyUI / Local AI' controls the GPU used when opening ComfyUI. 'Video render device' controls whether FFmpeg finalizes the MP4 with CPU, one GPU, or multiple GPUs.
local_ai.no_gpu_detected: Detected GPUs: none. FFmpeg will use CPU if no hardware encoder is available.

progress.auto_setup_storyboard: Automatic setup had issues. Continuing with Storyboard local...
progress.lmstudio_timeout_local: LM Studio was not ready in time. Building the project locally...
progress.lmstudio_unavailable_local: LM Studio is unavailable. Building the project locally...
progress.local_ai_failed_storyboard: Local AI render failed. Continuing with Storyboard local...
progress.opening_comfyui_avatar: Opening ComfyUI automatically for avatar render...
progress.opening_comfyui_storyboard: Opening ComfyUI automatically for storyboard visuals...

quick_setup.tip: Use the default values if you do not want to touch the technical settings.

status.auto_close_zero: Auto-close timer reached zero. Closing application.
status.comfyui_not_found: ComfyUI was not found. Use 'Prepare environment automatically' first.
status.lmstudio_not_found: LM Studio was not found. Use 'Prepare environment automatically' first.
status.project_generated_saved: Project generated and saved to history.
status.provider_avatar_note: Local Avatar video uses an avatar/lipsync workflow and a base image for HeyGen-style results.
status.provider_local_ai_note: Local AI video needs a ComfyUI workflow that outputs real clips or gifs per scene.
status.provider_storyboard_note: Storyboard local creates an MP4 from animated images. Use Local AI video or Local Avatar video for real clips.
status.recommended_checkpoint_installed: Recommended checkpoint installed. Restart ComfyUI if it was already open.
status.storyboard_auto_fallback_selected: ComfyUI was not ready. Storyboard local was selected automatically.
status.storyboard_environment_prepared: Environment prepared automatically for storyboard shorts.
status.storyboard_local_fallback: ComfyUI was not ready. Storyboard local will continue with local fallback visuals.
status.silent_brief_forcing_no_voice: The brief requests a video without narration. Voice generation and burned captions were disabled automatically.
status.avatar_environment_prepared: Environment prepared automatically for avatar video.
status.full_video_environment_prepared: Environment prepared automatically for full video generation.
status.workflow_image_detected: ComfyUI workflow updated: {path}. Static image output detected; this is valid for AI-enhanced Storyboard local, but not for Local AI video or Local Avatar video.
status.workflow_unknown_detected: ComfyUI workflow updated: {path}. Output type could not be detected automatically.
status.workflow_updated: ComfyUI workflow updated: {path}. Video output detected.

tooltips.video_encoder: Auto picks the best encoder available in FFmpeg. GPU encoders require real FFmpeg support and compatible drivers. If hardware encoding fails, the app retries automatically on CPU.
tooltips.video_render_device: Auto tries to use the best available GPU. CPU is the safest but slowest option. You can also force a vendor or a specific GPU when multiple devices are available.
